locator.quote: locked_pnl per pair = max(0, min over outcomes of pair P&L)

text: scalping_locked_pnl per pair is defined as max(0, min over outcomes of pair P&L) — the guaranteed worst-case floor, not realised P&L.
An equal-stake pair locks nothing (min over outcomes = 0), so the reward no longer credits accidental pairs where the agent got lucky on outcome.
